text.title: unit-testing Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for unit-testing as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Coverage measures execution, not correctness. Always assert observable outcomes.

failure-mode.description: Testing internals to reach coverage targets
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Private methods and implementation details should be tested through public API. If a private method is complex enough to need direct testing, extract it to a separate class.

failure-mode.description: Asserting on private methods or internal state
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tests tied to implementation break on every refactor, even when behavior is correct.

failure-mode.description: Asserting on floating-point equality without tolerance
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Floating-point arithmetic is not exact — use pytest.approx() or math.isclose().

failure-mode.description: Asserting on dictionary ordering or set iteration order
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Python dicts are ordered by insertion since 3.7, but set ordering is undefined. Use sorted() for sets, explicit key lookups for dicts.

failure-mode.description: Mocking every dependency in a unit test, including simple value objects
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: When the test mocks everything, it proves nothing. Use real collaborators within your own codebase; only mock external boundaries (I/O, time, network).

failure-mode.description: Unit test touches the filesystem, database, or network
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Unit tests must run in milliseconds. Use tmp_path for files, in-memory SQLite for DB, mocks for network. Slow unit tests → developers skip running them locally.

failure-mode.description: Tests share a mutable object created once in conftest or setUp
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Shared mutable state makes tests order-dependent and non-repeatable.
